who: small HR teams in accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll tax filings/month
offer: For small HR teams in accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll tax filings/month, compliance issues cause penalties and late filings. We provide compliance checklists instead of manual tracking and compliance checks.
problem: Ensuring compliance with payroll tax regulations
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for small HR teams
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on compliance

try_it: Let users try monthly compliance checklist generation and manual entry for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short user interviews for feedback
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing payroll data
